SEARCH
Package com.shapeville.model

Class TaskDefinition

java.lang.Object
com.shapeville.model.TaskDefinition
public class TaskDefinition extends Object
Defines the metadata for a specific task within the Shapeville application. It holds identifiers for the task, its corresponding UI panel, the task type for logic mapping, and whether the task uses advanced scoring.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • TaskDefinition

      public TaskDefinition(String taskId, String panelId, String taskType, boolean isAdvancedScoring)
      Constructs a new TaskDefinition.
      Parameters:
      taskId - A unique identifier for this specific task.
      panelId - The ID of the UI panel associated with this task.
      taskType - The type of the task, used for logic mapping.
      isAdvancedScoring - True if this task uses the advanced scoring rules, false otherwise.

  • Method Details

    • getTaskId

      public String getTaskId()
      Gets the unique identifier for the task.
      Returns:
      The task ID.

      Gets the identifier for the UI panel associated with this task.
      Returns:
      The panel ID.

    • getTaskType

      public String getTaskType()
      Gets the type identifier for the task.
      Returns:
      The task type.

    • isAdvancedScoring

      public boolean isAdvancedScoring()
      Checks if the task uses advanced scoring.
      Returns:
      True if advanced scoring is used, false otherwise.
